series_metadata.series_description: Files developed during investigations of known or alleged fraud, abuse, and irregularities or violations of laws and regulations. This record series includes, but not limited to; investigative files relating to employee, complaints, state audit referrals, and external compliant referrals, etc. These files consist of investigative reports and related documents, such as correspondence, subpoenas, notes, attachments, and working papers.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for five (5) federal fiscal years from the date the investigation is completed then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for five (5) federal fiscal years from the date the investigation is completed then destroy. When paper is converted to machine readable format, check for accuracy and completeness prior to discarding the paper., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
